rationale: Educ. Code §12.253 establishes the purpose of the adult high school charter school program and contains no provision relating to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The purpose of the adult high school charter school program, as established under former Section 29.259 and provided by this subchapter, is to meet industry needs for a sufficiently trained workforce within the state and strengthen the economic and educational prosperity of the state.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict exists.
